problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
